name: Whiskey Gamin

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Driving While a Drink
abilities.text: While this model has a friendly Poison token, it receives +2 Sp, but suffers -1 Df and Wp.

actions.name: Moonshine Dispenser
actions.effects: If this attack receives a raise, move the target up to 3" directly away from this model.

actions.name: Froth Over
actions.effects: Make a Remains marker within range. Enemy models within (Y)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Df duel or gain Distracted and Poison tokens. Allies within (Y)2" of the made marker may gain a Poison token. Then, remove the marker.

actions.name: A Shot of Genius
actions.effects: Target gains either a Poison or an Insight token.

merge_warnings: Name mismatch: front='Whiskey Gamin' back='Moonshine Dispenser'
extraction_notes: Froth Over uses (Y) symbol for aura range around the marker, rendered as (Y)2"
Attack action 'Moonshine Dispenser' has TN listed as '-' (dash), interpreted as null
